evals.prompt: Start a research project: 'Kafka beats Kinesis for our event-streaming workload.' Verdict shape: shortlist.
evals.expected_output: A new wiki/research/{date}-{slug}/ folder scaffolded with overview.md (claim + verdict_shape recorded), the four pillar pages, sources/, and an empty artifact placeholder.

evals.prompt: Investigate event-streaming options — claim is 'managed Kinesis is good enough for our scale'. Verdict shape: matrix.
evals.expected_output: Same scaffold; the project is ready for capture.

evals.prompt: Start a research project on whether to migrate to Postgres 17.
evals.expected_output: Asks the user to declare the central claim and verdict shape before scaffolding; refuses to scaffold without both.
